_comment: Tier-2 Layer-C: kratos linear_elasticity numerical-correctness gate. Cross-backend mirror of fenics + skfem + ngsolve elasticity_mms_convergence. The Kratos catalog template (src/backends/kratos/generators/linear_elasticity.py) uses a scipy-Voigt-B-matrix manual assembly pattern with plane-strain D-matrix [[λ+2μ, λ, 0], [λ, λ+2μ, 0], [0, 0, μ]] — engineering γ_xy notation. Task #25 tracks migration to KratosMultiphysics StructuralMechanicsApplication; floors here will still hold. Same MMS u = (sin(πx)·sin(πy), sin(2πx)·sin(2πy)), plane strain E=1.0/ν=0.3, f = -μ·Δu - (λ+μ)·grad(div(u)) (Navier form). Asserts P1 nx=32 L2 error <= 1.3e-2 and P1 EOC nx=16 → nx=32 in [1.7, 2.3]. Verified on 2026-06-01: P1=6.90e-3, EOC=1.928. CROSS-BACKEND AGREEMENT: kratos 6.90e-3 vs fenics 8.99e-3 vs skfem 8.96e-3 vs ngsolve 1.31e-2 — kratos is lowest because the centroid-quadrature for f aligns well with sin·sin manufactured source (similar advantage seen in kratos poisson gate, commit 61019ee).
